channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mombasa Governor Nassir Waives Bills, Frees 480 Patients and Over 300 Petty Offenders During Eid
item.description: During Eid al-Fitr celebrations, Mombasa Governor Abdulswammad Shariff Nassir, through the Nassir Foundation, launched a kind initiative that cleared outstanding hospital bills for patients at Coast G...

item.title: Bafana Bafana recall Zwane, Hlongwane and Maseko for Panama friendlies as Broos looks to rebuild squad ahead of 2026 World Cup
item.description: Veteran midfielder Themba Zwane, along with wingers Bongokuhle Hlongwane and Thapelo Maseko, has been called up to the Bafana Bafana squad for two upcoming friendly matches against Panama later this m...

item.title: Melting Glaciers in Bolivia Create New Risks for Mountain Communities
item.description: Bolivia’s glaciers are retreating at an alarming rate, with a rapid loss of nearly 10% of glacier surface area between 2016 and 2022. This shrinkage has led to the formation of 60 new glacial lakes, s...

item.title: SNEPCo Completes Bonga FPSO Turnaround Maintenance Ahead of Schedule and Resumes Production Safely
item.description: Shell Nigeria Exploration and Production Company Limited (SNEPCo) don resume production at di Bonga Floating Production, Storage and Offloading (FPSO) vessel on March 6, 2026, after finishing one majo...

item.title: Scattered fuel shortages emerge at some Kenyan petrol stations despite official assurances of adequate supply
item.description: Some petrol stations in Kenya have begun reporting fuel shortages and rationing, with motorists in several areas encountering dry pumps and long queues, even as the government insists that national fu...

item.title: Huyton driver jailed after fatal crash while drunk at double speed limit
item.description: A 35-year-old man, James O'Donnell, has been sentenced to 11 years and eight months in prison after causing the death of 63-year-old cyclist Keith Hornby in Huyton, Merseyside. The tragedy occurred on...

item.title: A Comprehensive Guide to Top Podcasts Across Genres
item.description: Podcasts have become a modern equivalent to radio, offering diverse content for nearly every interest. This article from WIRED curates the best podcasts for a wide range of categories including techno...

item.title: Tracy Crisp on how her husband’s reassurance during a dark time strengthened their marriage
item.description: Tracy Crisp met Adrian at 18 and married him at 23, drawn to his genuine nature, sense of humour and authenticity. Their relationship has always been marked by honesty and shared adventures, including...

item.title: Security group warns of planned attacks in three Kwara LGAs on March 23 and 28
item.description: A local security outfit called the Kwara South Joint Security Watch don raise alarm say some suspected terrorists dey plan big attacks for three local government areas (Ifelodun, Irepodun, and Isin) i...

item.title: Committee Focuses on Eastern Cape Economic Zones and Automotive Industry
item.description: The Portfolio Committee on Trade, Industry, and Competition recently visited the Eastern Cape province to assess the progress and challenges of its industrial zones, particularly in the automotive sec...

item.title: Nibinamik First Nation faces renewed power troubles as main generator fails
item.description: Nibinamik First Nation, also known as Summer Beaver, is once again grappling with serious power problems in its remote Oji-Cree community, located roughly 500 kilometres north of Thunder Bay, Ontario....

item.title: Fréchette and Drainville Debate Key Issues in CAQ Leadership Race
item.description: In Quebec City, Christine Fréchette and Bernard Drainville clashed in the first leadership debate for the Coalition Avenir Québec (CAQ), following Premier François Legault's announcement that he would...

item.title: Ruto, Museveni launch Kisumu–Malaba SGR extension to boost regional trade
item.description: President William Ruto and his Ugandan counterpart Yoweri Museveni have launched the extension of the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) between Kisumu and Malaba, a key infrastructure project meant to stre...

item.title: Argentina’s Human Rights Legacy under Threat Fifty Years after the 1976 Coup
item.description: Nearly five decades after the 1976 coup that overthrew Isabel Martínez de Perón, Argentina continues to wrestle with the legacy of its brutal military dictatorship. The regime led by Jorge Videla, Emi...

item.title: Dogs and Cats Seized in Major L.A. County Animal Welfare Operation Amid Cruelty Investigation
item.description: Authorities in Los Angeles County carried out one of the largest animal seizures in recent history at a property in rural Lake Hughes on March 20, 2026. The operation targeted Rock N Pawz, an animal r...

item.title: Toyota Tanzania commemorates 60 years with partnership in Kilimanjaro Marathon
item.description: Toyota Tanzania, a member of the Karimjee Group, has entered into a key partnership with the Kilimanjaro Premium Lager International Marathon as part of its 60th anniversary celebrations in the countr...

item.title: NCDMB Collaborates with Renaissance and MJD to Train 33 Young Nigerian Engineers in Pipeline and Corrosion Management
item.description: The Nigerian Content Development and Monitoring Board (NCDMB), together with Renaissance Africa Energy Company Ltd and MJD Oilfield Services Ltd, don start a twelve-month Nigerian Content Human Capita...

item.title: Varginha commemorates 30 years of the 1996 alleged alien sighting amid enduring debate and tourism boom
item.description: In the Brazilian city of Varginha, residents and visitors are marking the 30th anniversary of one of the country’s most enduring mysteries: the alleged 1996 alien encounter, often compared to the Rosw...

item.title: Crosby and Rakell lead Penguins to shootout win over Jets
item.description: The Pittsburgh Penguins edged the Winnipeg Jets 5–4 in a thrilling shootout on Saturday, with Sidney Crosby and Rickard Rakell scoring the decisive goals. The victory gave Pittsburgh another valuable ...

item.title: Liz Jackson Voices Frustration over Petrol Station Fuel Limits amid Shortage Concerns
item.description: Digital influencer Liz Jackson has raised alarm about the ongoing fuel shortage after being limited to purchasing only KSh 2,000 worth of petrol at her usual filling station. The celebrity, known for ...
